Transmit FIFO Read

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x74
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Reads the top entry of the TX FIFO (or THR if FIFOs disabled) in FIFO access test mode. Only valid when FIFO_ACCESS is configured and FAR[0]=1.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7:0] tfr r 0x0 TFR
